verses.text: Topa in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel mualte tungah thu gen in la, Topa Pasian ahi keimah in amaute tungah gen ding ka neih thute hih bangin gen in
Israel-te' galte in, ‘Hih tangtawng mualtung gamte tu-in eima-a' hita hi,’ ci vial uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin mailam thu ding gen in la, Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen hih bangin pulak in: Na kimkot uhah a om minam dangte in no Israel mualtung gamte hong la-in na neihsate uh a hong suh uh ciangin, mite khempeuh in no Israel mite hong simmawh bawlin hong ciamnuihbawl lel uh hi

Tua ahih manin no Israel mualtung gamte aw, Topa Pasian ahi keimah in mual lian leh mual neute, lui leh guamte, a kisia-in a kinusia munte, leh a kiima minam dangte in luhgawpin a ciamnuihbawl khuapite tungah ka gen thute ngai un

“Topa Pasian ahi keimah in a kimkotah a om minam dangte, leh a diakdiakin Edom mite tungah ka hehluatna tawh thu ka gen hi. Amaute in lungdamin nuihna leh simmawhna tawh keima leitang la-in a tang uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin Israel gam tawh kisai-in mailam thu genkhol in la, a kimkotah a om minam dangte in a simmawh bawlna hangun Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hehna tawh ka thugente, mual lian, mual neu, lui leh guamte tungah gen in
Topa Pasian ahi keimah in a kimkotah a om minam dangte ka mindaisak ding khauhtakin ka kiciam hi
Ahi zongin Israel mualtung gamte-ah no ka mi Israel-te-a' dingin singkungte in teh leh gah hong neikik ding uh a, a sawtloin note, inn-ah a hong ciahkik ding na hi uh hi
Kei pen note' lamah kong pang ding a, pelloin na gam uh lo-in kikho kikin khaici kituhkik ding hi
A mi-in zong kong pungsak ding a, khuapite sungah tengkikin a sia khempeuh na puahkik ding uh hi

A mihing a ganhingin kong pungsak ding a, a nidang sangin tam na phazaw ding uh hi. Ta tampi tak na nei ding uh hi. Nidangin na om ngei bangun kong omsak kik ding a, a nidang sangin a cithei zaw-in kong bawl ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na hong thei ding uh hi
No ka mi Israel-te, na leitang uhah kong gamtangsak kik ding hi. Note' leitang suak ding a, tua leitang in na tate uh gilkialin puksisak nawnlo ding hi
“Topa Pasian ahi keimah in kong genin-ah: Israel mualtung gamte, mihing sane hi a, tua mualtung gamte in a gamsung mite' tate laksak hi, ci-in a beisa hunah hong kigennate a man ahi hi
Ahi zongin tu-a kipanin mihing sa a ne, gamsung mite' tate a laksak gam hi nawnlo ding hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu ka gen khin hi

Minam dangte' hong kobawlna za nawnloin, a hong mindaisakna uh na thuak nawn kei ding uh a, na sung uhah a teng mite' tate zong no Israel mualtung gamte in na laksak nawn kei ding uh hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu ka gen khin hi,” hong ci hi
Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a
“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel mite amaute' gamah a ten' lai-un amaute' gamtatna leh a sepnate uh tawh tua gam ninsak uh hi. Amaute' gamtatnate pen numeite' neih nin zahin a ninin ka ngaihsun hi
Tua ahih manin gamsungah amaute' mi thahna leh a milimte uh tawh gamsungteng a nitsakna hangun ka hehnateng ka thuaksak hi
Amaute' nuntakna zia leh a gamtatna ziate uh tawh kizui-in amaute tungah thu ka khen a, gamdang mun citengah amaute ka thehthang hi

Ahi zongin midangte in, ‘Hih mite pen Topa' mite hinapi-in, Pasian in amaute' tungah a piak gam panin taikhia uh hi,’ ci-in a paina peuhpeuh uhah na kigen ahih manin, ka min siangtho hong daisak uh hi
Israel mite in a paina peuhpeuh uh gamdang mite lakah ka min siangtho hong daisak kawikawi uh ahih manin tua thu in ka lung hong himawhsak hi

“Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian keimah in Israel mite tungah ka gen ding thute hih bangin gen in: Israel mite aw, tu-a ka sep ding thu pen note kong khualna hang hiloin, minam dang khempeuhte' lakah na daisak kawikawi uh ka min siangtho ka khualna hang hizaw hi

Note in minam dangte' lakah na daisaksa uh a lian ka min siangtho pen tu-in minam dangte' lakah a siangthona ka langsak ding hi. Keimah in minam dangte' lakah ka siangthona ka lahna dingin note kong zang ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu amaute in hong thei ding uh hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khin hi
Gam khempeuh leh minam khempeuhte lak panin note hong kaikhawm kikin na gam uhah kong tun'pih kik ding hi
Note tungah tui siangtho kong theh ding a, na milim biakna uh leh note hong ninsak na dang khempeuh panin kong siangsak ding hi
Note sungah lungtang thak leh lungsim thak kong guan' ding a, na suang lungtang uh hong lakkhiatsakin mihing lungtang kong guan' ding hi
Note sungah keima kha kong guang ding a, note tungah kong piak ka thukhamte leh ka thupiakte limtakin kong zuisak ding hi
Tua ciangin na pu na pate uh tungah ka piaksa gamah na teng ding uh a, note pen keima mi hi-in, kei pen note' Pasian ka hi ding hi
Note hong ninsak thei ding na khempeuh panin kong hu ding hi. An tampi ka piangsak ding a, gilkial na thuakkha nawn kei ding uh hi
Na singgah kungte uh leh na lolai ante uh tampi tak ka phasak ding a, minam dangte lakah gilkiala mindaina na thuakkha nawn kei ding uh hi
Na gamtatnasa uh na gitlohnate uh leh na hoihlohnate uh na phawk kik ding uh a, na mawhna uh leh na khialhnate uh hangin nomau mahmah na kimudahtawm ding uh hi

Israel mite aw, hih thute khempeuh, note' lungdamna dingin a bawl ding ka hihlohna thu na theih ding uh ka deih hi. Na gamtatnasate uh hangin maizumin na mindai ding uh ka deihna hizaw hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu kong gen khin hi
“Na mawhna khempeuh panun note kong sian'sak khit ciangin na khuapite uh sungah hong tengsak kikin, a sia khempeuh kong puahsak kik ding hi
Na lote uh a nawkkha ngei mite' muhna-ah gammang tulak a bat ngei hangin, tu-in tua lote kho-in note kong puahsak kik ta ding hi

Hih leitang pen gammang tulak a bang ngei hinapi-in tu-in Eden Huan a batna leh a kisusia, a kiluhgawp, a kinusiacip khuapite pen tu-in a muan'huai kulh tawh ki-umin a sungah mi a ten'na thu mi khempeuh in gen belin nei ding uh hi

Tua ciangin note' kimkotah a om a suakta lai minam dangte in a siasa khuapite lamkikin, a kinusia lote a puahkikpa pen Topa ahi keimah ka hihna thu hong thei ding uh hi. Topa ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khin a, ka gen bangin ka gamta ding hi
“Tu-a tengbek hiloin adang zong ka hih lai ding hi. Keima tung pan Israel mite huhna ka ngensak ding a, tuuhonpi bangin Israel mite ka tamsak ding hi

Tuhunin a sia-in a omcip khuapite pen a kiseh pawi hun ciangin biakna dingin a kipaipih, Jerusalem-a tuuhonpi om muamua bangin, mi tampi tawh kidim ding uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu hong thei ding uh hi,” hong ci hi.
